alarmTimeoutHelp: Time (in milliseconds) after no message reception that an alarm is cleared.
useChannelsHelp: Can be useful for devices that have more than one sensor.
useDetectionTargets: Create camera detection target channels below devices
useDetectionTargetsHelp: Can be useful for smart devices that classify motion targets (eg. 'human', 'vehicle', etc').
sendingDescription: It is possible to use ioBroker's sendTo functionality to send event XML and/or images to other adapters (eg. Telegram, email, pushsafer, etc).
sendXmlMessageHelp:
JS code to construct the message object to send.
Eg. to send a simple text message to Telegram use, `Received ${ctx.eventType} from ${ctx.deviceName}`.
Event details are available in the ctx variable (event context).
sendXmlThrottleByDevice: Throttle for XML is on a per-device basis
sendXmlMessageRequired: XML message text cannot be blank
sendImageMessageHelp:
JS code to construct the message object to send.
Eg. to send images to Telegram use, { text: imageBuffer, type: 'photo' }.
Available variables are imageBuffer and ctx (event context).
sendImageThrottleByDevice: Throttle for images is on a per-device basis
sendImageMessageRequired: Image message text cannot be blank
sendThrottleHelp:
Skip sending unless at least this time has elapsed since last message (time in milliseconds).
Set to zero to disable.
sendThrottleByDeviceHelp: Uncheck to make minimum delay between sending a global condition (ie. irrespective of source device).
savingDescription: It is possible to save event XML and/or images (to the iobroker-data directory) for further processing/analysis/archiving/etc.
processingDescription: Perform the following processing on XML/images before saving and/or sending
annotateImagesHelp: Draws region box and label for detected target.
